api.//tenant: The tenant is resolved by the gateway from the 'X-FactoryOS-Tenant' header (preferred) or the 'tenant' query fallback shown below; a request with no resolvable tenant is rejected with 400.
api.workOrders: GET /m/maintenance/workorders[?status=Open]   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  |  GET /m/maintenance/workorders?tenant=<tenant>&status=Open   — soonest-due first; optional case-insensitive status filter
api.summary: GET /m/maintenance/summary   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  |  GET /m/maintenance/summary?tenant=<tenant>   — total work orders and per-status counts
